title: Rich Mediterranean Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A rich and juicy mediterranean dish featuring unsalted pistachios that appeals to midnight cravings, suitable for egg-free diets.
instructions: Wash and pat dry the pistachios. Halve the tomatoes lengthwise and slice them into thin strips.
Peel and finely chop the onion, keeping some of its green part for color and flavor.
Mince the garlic cloves and mix with chopped onions in a large mixing bowl.
Add halved and sliced tomato pieces to the bowl along with red pepper flakes and olive oil. Mix well.
Pour water into the mixing bowl, cover it, and let sit for 10 minutes. This will allow the tomatoes to release their juices.
Once done soaking, pour out the water and discard it. Stir in the chopped pistachios. Season with salt if needed.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add a bit of olive oil, then gently toss in the mixture from the mixing bowl.
Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until the tomatoes and onions are softened and slightly caramelized. Keep tossing to prevent sticking.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
